CRM concept · workflow system

GrowDesk
as an operating layer.

A streamlined CRM concept designed to unify contacts, campaigns, sales pipelines, and KPI visibility into one clearer workflow for smaller growth teams.

Explore project Back to studio

Core idea

Fewer disconnected tools. More operational clarity.

GrowDesk is built around the idea that CRM, pipeline, campaigns, and performance visibility should feel like one working system instead of multiple disconnected dashboards.

A readable growth system

The KPI board gives the team a single operational view of sales movement, targets, activity, and performance — making the product feel closer to a live working layer than a static reporting screen.

  • ✓
    Live KPI visibility
  • ✓
    Revenue and activity tied together
  • ✓
    Built for faster team understanding

Pipeline movement with context

The pipeline is designed to stay visual and readable while connecting movement in deal stages back to live performance and team progress.

  • ✓
    Drag-and-drop sales flow
  • ✓
    Stage movement tied to performance visibility
  • ✓
    Cleaner than enterprise-heavy CRM logic

System logic

Structured from contact to performance.

The idea behind GrowDesk is not only to manage deals, but to make the whole structure around contacts, lists, and movement easier to operate.

Contact and list structure

Lists and contact organization are treated as an early operating layer, helping teams structure lead groups and activity before the pipeline becomes overloaded.

Performance built in

Reporting is not separated from the rest of the system. It sits close to the working flow so that performance stays visible while decisions are being made.

3Core systems connected
1Shared workflow
LiveOperational visibility
LessFriction between teams

My role

From workflow idea to system concept.

GrowDesk is positioned as a leaner, clearer CRM concept focused on simplifying how smaller sales and marketing teams operate day to day.

What I worked on

Product Concept

Defined the idea of combining contacts, pipeline, campaigns, and KPI visibility inside one cleaner workflow.

UX / UI

Worked on the structure, dashboard logic, and how the product communicates movement and performance visually.

System Design

Focused on how lists, contacts, pipeline stages, and reporting could feel like one readable operating layer.

Frontend Prototype

Shaped the concept into a presentable product prototype and portfolio-ready case study direction.

Deepwork Studio

A product-focused portfolio built around systems, workflows, and digital tools that move from concept to usable experience.
